\begin{figure}[htbp]
  \centering
  \includegraphics[width=0.9\linewidth]{FIGURES/ch04_td_vs_fft.pdf}
  \caption[Time-domain amplitude $A_\mathrm{td}$ vs]{
    Time-domain amplitude $A_\mathrm{td}$ vs.\ FFT amplitude $A_\mathrm{FFT}$ at the paddle frequency per probe (341 wave runs; wind: full, no). Top row: scatter; dashed = 1:1 line. Bottom row: ratio $A_\mathrm{FFT}/A_\mathrm{td}$ vs.\ frequency. Ratio $\to 1$ under no wind; $\to 0$ at the IN probe under full wind (time-domain dominated by wind waves). Confirms $A_\mathrm{FFT}$ as the only valid amplitude metric under wind.
  }
  \label{fig:ch04_td_vs_fft}
\end{figure}
